reasoning: The holy mace exhibits strong color harmony aligned with the Echoes-tuned palette. Primary palette: sky-blue shaft, saturated sunset-orange flame/gem top, warm brown handle, cream/white highlights — a classic warm-cool complementary split where warm (orange) dominates the focal point. All hues match swatches in the reference palette (sky blue, amber-orange, warm brown, parchment white). Shadow areas on the asset itself use deeper blue-teal and warm brown darks, not pure grey or black. Overall mood reads BRIGHT and warm with a holy/radiant character. Minor note: the sky-blue shaft leans slightly cool in isolation, but it is visually subordinate to the warm orange crown, so overall warmth balance is maintained. Saturation is healthy throughout — no muddy or desaturated passages. Palette compatibility is high.
